options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <x1> # X1 (float, required) <y1> # Y1 (float, required) <x2> # X2 (float, required) <y2> # Y2 (float, required) <PtnFeedthroughName> # name of the routing feedthrough (string, required) <layerID> # metal layer(s) that can route through the partition feedthrough
